mapper.select:
select community_no, community_title, community_content, community_writer, to_char(community_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') as community_date, view_count, member_thumb, member_grade, (select count(*) from community_like_tbl l where c.community_no = l.community_no) as like_count, (select count(*) from community_dislike_tbl d where c.community_no = d.community_no) as dislike_count, (select count(*) from community_report_tbl r where c.community_no = r.community_no) as report_count from community_tbl c join member_tbl on (community_writer = member_id) where community_status = 1
and (community_title like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%' or community_content like '%'||#{searchKeyword}||'%')
and community_writer = #{searchKeyword}
order by member_grade asc , community_no desc , community_no asc , view_count desc , like_count desc , dislike_count desc , report_count desc offset #{page}*#{size} rows fetch next #{size} rows only
select community_no, community_title, community_content, community_writer, to_char(community_date,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi') community_date from community_tbl where community_no = #{communityNo}

select c.community_no, c.community_title, c.community_content, c.community_writer, to_char(c.community_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as community_date, c.view_count, (select count(*) from community_like_tbl l where c.community_no = l.community_no) as like_count from community_tbl c join member_tbl m on (c.community_writer = m.member_id) where c.community_status = 1
order by like_count desc, c.community_no desc
and m.member_grade in (1, 2) order by c.community_no desc
offset 0 rows fetch next 5 rows only
